notes: Tenet Healthcare. AHRQ name 'Tenet Healthcare', Dallas TX, ownership=5 (for-profit, SEC-confirmed). 77 CCNs (57 acute), 3+ states. Sole name match.
HCA Healthcare. AHRQ 'HCA Healthcare', Nashville TN, ownership=5. 185 CCNs (167 acute). One CCN parented 'Hill Country Memorial' (JV) but AHRQ assigns it to HCA.

Universal Health Services. AHRQ HQ 'Norristown PA' vs seed 'King of Prussia PA' (same Philadelphia metro/legal entity). ownership=5. 158 CCNs but only 27 acute (rest are UHS behavioral facilities) - watch acute-vs-total when sizing beds.

BayCare Health System NAME TRAP: AHRQ has NO standalone BayCare system; it folds BayCare's hospitals under Trinity Health (HSI00001106) via corp_parent='BAYCARE HEALTH SYSTEM' (Trinity co-sponsors BayCare). ahrq_system_id is therefore SHARED with #29 Trinity. ccn_list scoped to the 11 BAYCARE-parent CCNs only (FL: Morton Plant, Mease, St Joseph's Tampa, St Anthony's, Winter Haven, Bartow, South FL Baptist, Wesley Chapel, + Baycare Alliant non-acute). DISJOINT from #29 by construction (those 11 excluded from Trinity's list). Distinct from 'Aurora BayCare' (Green Bay WI) which belongs to Advocate (#17).

NewYork-Presbyterian. AHRQ 'New York Presbyterian Healthcare System', NYC. NOT 'Presbyterian Healthcare Services' (Albuquerque NM), NOT Hoag (CA), NOT Saint Lukes Episcopal Presbyterian (MO). 8 CCNs (7 acute), teach=2.
Community Health Systems. AHRQ 'Community Health Systems', Franklin TN, ownership=5 (SEC-confirmed FP). 81 CCNs (77 acute).

AdventHealth NAME TRAP: AHRQ 'AdventHealth' (HSI00000010), Altamonte Springs FL, ownership=2 (church-operated=Adventist) -> confirms faith_tradition=Adventist. DISTINCT from #38 Adventist Health (HSI00000011, CA) and from 'Adventist Healthcare' (Gaithersburg MD, HSI00000012). 42 CCNs.

Baylor Scott & White. AHRQ 'Baylor Scott and White Health', Dallas TX. 31 CCNs all TX (25 acute); 3 CCNs parented to Tenet/Select Medical/NA (JVs) but AHRQ assigns to BSW. Seed reporting_period=derived_3mo (calendar artifact, not boundary).
Mayo Clinic. AHRQ 'Mayo Clinic Health System', Rochester MN, teach=2. 26 CCNs across MN/WI/AZ/FL/IA. Sole Mayo match.
ProMedica. AHRQ 'ProMedica', Toledo OH. 11 CCNs OH/MI. Note: ProMedica divested senior-care/insurance (Paramount) ~2024; AHRQ 2023 hospital footprint still valid for acute CCNs.
RWJBarnabas Health. AHRQ 'RWJBarnabas Health', West Orange NJ. 16 CCNs all NJ (14 acute). Sole match.
Intermountain Health. AHRQ 'Intermountain Healthcare', Salt Lake City UT. 33 CCNs UT/ID/CO/MT (post-SCL Health merger footprint). sys_anyins_product=1 (SelectHealth).
Inova Health System. AHRQ 'Inova Health System', Falls Church VA (seed 'Fairfax VA' - adjacent, same system). 5 CCNs all VA. Sole match.
HonorHealth. AHRQ 'HonorHealth', Scottsdale AZ. 7 CCNs all AZ (6 acute). Sole match.
Sanford Health. AHRQ 'Sanford Health', Sioux Falls SD. 41 CCNs SD/MN/ND/IA/MT (40 acute). sys_anyins_product=1 (Sanford Health Plan).

Corewell Health NAME TRAP: AHRQ 'Corewell Health' (HSI00001021), HQ Grand Rapids MI (legacy Spectrum) vs seed HQ 'Southfield MI' (legacy Beaumont) - same fully-merged system (ex-Beaumont + ex-Spectrum, 2022). 23 CCNs all MI, fully consolidated. No residual 'Beaumont'/'Spectrum' system in AHRQ.

Advocate Health. AHRQ 'Advocate Health' (HSI00001526), Charlotte NC = COMBINED Advocate Aurora + Atrium (merger closed 2022-12-02, pre-AHRQ-2023 vintage). 58 CCNs across NC(22 Atrium)/IL(11 Advocate)/WI(15 Aurora)/GA/SC/AL - matches seed 'multi-region NC/IL/WI'. Includes 'Aurora BayCare' (Green Bay WI) - NOT FL BayCare(#4).
Cleveland Clinic. AHRQ 'Cleveland Clinic', Cleveland OH, teach=2. 21 CCNs OH/FL (incl. Cleveland Clinic Florida/Weston). Sole match.

Banner Health. AHRQ 'Banner Health', Phoenix AZ. 33 CCNs AZ/CO/WY/NE/NV/CA. sys_anyins_product=1 (Banner|Aetna). NOTE: seed revenue $4.1B is flagged out-of-tolerance in notes.md (Phase-0 F2) - crosswalk unaffected.
UPMC. AHRQ 'UPMC', Pittsburgh PA, teach=2. 34 CCNs (32 PA + 1 MD + 1 NY). sys_anyins_product=1 (large insurance arm). Sole match.
Orlando Health. AHRQ 'Orlando Health', Orlando FL. 5 CCNs all FL. Sole match.
Novant Health. AHRQ 'Novant Health Inc', Winston-Salem NC. 13 CCNs all NC (12 acute). Sole match.
Northwell Health. AHRQ 'Northwell Health', New Hyde Park NY, teach=2. 19 CCNs all NY (18 acute). Sole match.
Bon Secours Mercy Health. AHRQ 'Bon Secours Mercy Health Inc', Cincinnati OH, ownership=2 (church-operated) -> confirms faith_tradition=Catholic. 37 CCNs OH/VA/SC/KY (36 acute).

BJC Health System M&A SCOPE: AHRQ 'BJC Healthcare' (HSI00000070) = LEGACY pre-merger BJC, 16 CCNs MO(12)/IL(4) only. BJC + Saint Luke's KC merger CLOSED 2024-01-01 (combined = 28 hospitals MO/KS/IL). AHRQ 2023 vintage predates close; Saint Luke's KC is a SEPARATE AHRQ system (HSI00000935, 9 acute hosp, MO/KS). Seed Q1-2026 reflects COMBINED entity -> AHRQ id is a SUBSET (missing Saint Luke's CCNs). To size combined beds/payer, union with HSI00000935 downstream.
Kaiser Permanente. AHRQ 'Kaiser Permanente', Oakland CA. 41 CCNs CA/OR/HI (40 acute). sys_anyins_product=1 (integrated plan is core). Revenue is mostly premium $ (denominator caveat).
Sutter Health. AHRQ 'Sutter Health', Sacramento CA. 27 CCNs (26 CA + 1 HI), 22 acute. Sole match.
Providence. AHRQ 'Providence' (HSI00000852), Renton WA, ownership=2 (church-operated) -> confirms faith_tradition=Catholic. 54 CCNs across 7 western states (WA/CA/OR/AK/MT/TX/NM), 50 acute.

Trinity Health (Livonia MI) NAME TRAP + AGGREGATION: AHRQ 'Trinity Health' MI row (HSI00001106), ownership=2 (Catholic), 14,914 beds. NOT the ND 'Trinity Health' (HSI00001107, 170 beds, secular). AHRQ FOLDS sub-systems into HSI00001106: corp_parents include TRINITY HEALTH(83), BAYCARE HEALTH SYSTEM(11 -> broken out as #4), GENESIS HEALTH SYSTEM(5, Davenport IA - legitimately Trinity), MERCY IOWA CITY(1). ccn_list here = HSI00001106 MINUS the 11 BayCare CCNs (to keep #4 and #29 DISJOINT). Still a parent-superset vs Becker's reporting entity (includes Genesis IA + all-state Trinity). Seed reporting_period=derived_3mo.

Mount Sinai Health System NAME TRAP: AHRQ 'Mount Sinai Health System' (HSI00000711), NYC, teach=2. NOT 'Mount Sinai Medical Center of Florida' (HSI00000712, Miami Beach) - the Miami entity is the HIMSS EMRAM Stage 7 press subject; do NOT credit NYC's maturity from it. 5 CCNs all NY (4 acute).

Mass General Brigham. AHRQ 'Mass General Brigham' (HSI00000813), HQ Boston MA (seed 'Somerville MA' - same system, new HQ). teach=2. 15 CCNs (14 MA + 1 NH), only 9 acute (rest specialty/psych/rehab). Seed income corrected to +$20.2M (notes.md correction #3).

Henry Ford Health M&A SCOPE: AHRQ 'Henry Ford Health' (HSI00000475) = LEGACY Henry Ford, 6 CCNs (5 acute) MI only. Henry Ford + Ascension Michigan JV CLOSED 2024-10-01 (added 8 ex-Ascension MI hospitals; combined ~12-13 acute). AHRQ 2023 predates close -> AHRQ id is a SUBSET (missing the ex-Ascension MI JV hospitals, which AHRQ-2023 still lists under Ascension HSI00000055). Seed Q1-2026 likely reflects combined JV.
SSM Health. AHRQ 'SSM Health' (HSI00000902), St. Louis MO, ownership=2 (church-operated) -> confirms faith_tradition=Catholic. 40 CCNs MO/WI/OK/IL (37 acute). sys_anyins_product=1 (Dean Health Plan).

Indiana University Health. AHRQ 'Indiana University Health' (HSI00000510), Indianapolis IN, teach=2. 14 CCNs all IN (13 acute). One CCN corp_parent='ASCENSION' (a JV facility) but AHRQ assigns to IU Health.

Parkview Health NAME TRAP: AHRQ 'Parkview Health System' (HSI00000811), Fort Wayne IN. NOT 'Parkview Medical Center' (HSI00001341, Pueblo CO). 11 CCNs (9 IN acute + 2 OH). Sole match for the IN system.

Ascension M&A SCOPE: AHRQ 'Ascension Health' (HSI00000055), St. Louis MO, ownership=2 (Catholic), largest Catholic system. 120 CCNs (104 acute) across 13 states INCLUDING MI(16). Ascension divested its Michigan hospitals into the Henry Ford JV (closed 2024-10-01), so AHRQ-2023 is a PARENT-SUPERSET vs the Q1-2026 entity (still counts the 16 MI CCNs that moved to Henry Ford #32). Otherwise national Catholic footprint matches.
Allina Health. AHRQ 'Allina Health' (HSI00000029), Minneapolis MN. 13 CCNs (12 MN + 1 WI). Sole match.

Adventist Health NAME TRAP: AHRQ 'Adventist Health' (HSI00000011), Roseville CA, ownership=2 (church-operated=Adventist). West-coast (CA/OR/HI). DISTINCT from #7 AdventHealth (HSI00000010, FL) and from 'Adventist Healthcare' (HSI00000012, Gaithersburg MD). 28 CCNs (25 acute).

University Hospitals NAME TRAP: AHRQ 'University Hospitals' (HSI00001156), Shaker Heights OH (Cleveland suburb; seed 'Cleveland OH'), teach=2. NOT 'University Hospital' (HSI00001154, Newark NJ, public) and NOT Brookdale (NY). 17 CCNs all OH (15 acute).

Montefiore Health System. AHRQ 'Montefiore Medical Center' (HSI00000700), Bronx NY (seed HQ 'New York NY'), teach=2, high-DSH safety-net. 8 CCNs all NY (7 acute). Sole Montefiore match. (Seed -$104.9M/-4.5% flagged UNVERIFIED in Phase-0 F1 - crosswalk unaffected.)
